column1: Hey kayla, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
word yea punta is dope for sure thats where I'll be!
how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
fire we got a bunch of bama groups rollin with us. y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
at some point early next month once we are all back at school
okay yea I got you. I'll send what we have at the moment, pricing is moving pretty quickly tho just a heads up
ill add in a discount and a payment plan to make it easier on everyone
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
awesome whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if it came through
dope lmk what the squad thinks
heyy Kayla whats up, how's the squad feelin so far?
not gonna lie it's way to expensive
Okay, how much were you lookin to spend? I'll find some options in that ballpark
That's the 4 night option did you see that one
hey is the 4 night doable for you or were you thinking even less? we can do 3 nights potentially
hey checkin in, we narrow down on which option we wanna go with?
sup! we still lookin to get situated for spring break?
whats up kayla did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
yoo kayla did y'all get to book anything for spring break yet
Hey kayla, just saw you filled out our Go Blue booking form. which destination were you looking to book for this spring?
bet lets do it! punta cana is lit for suure
were you ready to get things booked for the 4 of you?
it might be 4 it might be less all depends on price
got you ill send updated pricing over. did we want to do 4 nights or 5 nights
her an example of the 4 night https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/7OYXZVE38F
perfect i'm gonna send everything to my friends and get back to you
hey checkin in, we narrow in on which option we wanna roll with?
waiting on one more friend to confirm
aight cool. still lookin like 4-5 ppl?
okay right now it's just 2 of us and what does the price include?
just the stay at the hotel?
okay cool. do you have the OG email I sent you with the prices? at the top, theres a full list of everything thats included
are u able to resend it ?
okay i just looked at it and if we book it by the end of the week can we still get the booze cruise
unfortunately not that deal was from a while back, added it in there for you. I can get away with it for tomorrow but that'd be the extent
okay we are wanting to book either tonight or tomorrow morning at the occidental punta cana
and i think it's going to just be the 2 of us
so for the deposit i saw it was 200 down so would it be 200 total or 200 per person
perfect and then what would the total be per person for 2 people
we are gonna do the 5 nights
and we are ready to book today!
Okay cool, I'll hook it up with the free booze cruise!
Will send over the reservation in a few so you can get all secured
just emailed over the reservation. lmk if you need any help navigating through!
wait do we both need to pay the deposit separately or can i put 400 down for the both of us
is it easier for you to put down the 400? if so you can do that right onto your account slot. our ops team wil then allocate the 200 to your friends slot
during your payment, enter in 400 as the payment amount
I'll put the note in right away
i'm going to put the deposit down in the next couple of hours
i'm about to pay the 400 is the note made in my account
perfect. $200 was transferred to Emma's account
perfect and then we just have to put the rest of the deposit down by the 10th ?
okay we both just paid the full amount is there anything else we have to fill out?
Once you have your flight info you can add that to your account in the flight tab
but other than that our accounts are set?
hey when you have a min if you could have Emma upload her flights, so we can set up your airport transfers!
hi is there anything else we need to do before we leave
hey morning. lookin good, did you want to add any of the party pass events to your trip? those re the off resort nightclub parties at like Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, and Pearl Beach Club
hey hey safe travels today! lookin forward to havin y'all out here with us
hey we just landed what should we look for once we get through customs and immigration
Staff with a royal blue t shirt that says Go Blue Tours
